items.title_original: Shanghai-based AI chipmaker Biren raises ~$892.5M in a new share sale to boost GPU production; Biren's stock is up 150%+ since its January Hong Kong IPO (Ann Cao/South China Morning Post)
items.title_en: Shanghai-based AI chipmaker Biren raises ~$892.5M in a new share sale to boost GPU production; Biren's stock is up 150%+ since its January Hong Kong IPO (Ann Cao/South China Morning Post)
items.title_zh: 总部位于上海的人工智能芯片制造商 Biren 通过新股发行筹集了约 8.925 亿美元，以提高 GPU 产量；自 1 月份香港 IPO 以来，Biren 的股价已上涨 150% 以上（Ann Cao/南华早报）

items.title: Researchers document JadePuffer, the first known "agentic ransomware", which adapts in real time and retries steps to execute an end-to-end extortion operation (Bill Toulas/BleepingComputer)
items.title_original: Researchers document JadePuffer, the first known "agentic ransomware", which adapts in real time and retries steps to execute an end-to-end extortion operation (Bill Toulas/BleepingComputer)
items.title_en: Researchers document JadePuffer, the first known "agentic ransomware", which adapts in real time and retries steps to execute an end-to-end extortion operation (Bill Toulas/BleepingComputer)
items.title_zh: 研究人员记录了 JadePuffer，这是第一个已知的“代理勒索软件”，它可以实时适应并重试步骤来执行端到端勒索操作（Bill Toulas/BleepingComputer）
items.title_bilingual: 研究人员记录了 JadePuffer，这是第一个已知的“代理勒索软件”，它可以实时适应并重试步骤来执行端到端勒索操作（Bill Toulas/BleepingComputer） / Researchers document JadePuffer, the first known "agentic ransomware", which adapts in real time and retries steps to execute an end-to-end extortion operation (Bill Toulas/BleepingComputer)

items.title: How companies like Nvidia and Neura Robotics are building safety systems for humanoid robots to minimize risks like a bipedal robot losing stability (John Keilman/Wall Street Journal)
